problem id: 8cf926ca
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  11101100 -> 01111011
  11101110 -> 10111011
  11111011 -> 01111110
  11111101 -> 00111111
  00011001 -> 10011110
  00101011 -> 01011010
  10001110 -> 10101111
  11101101 -> 00111011
  01000100 -> 01110111

query: 11000101
predicted answer: 00110111
